National Fire Information Reporting System availability notice

September 1996
Public SafetyData & DatabasesJournalism & Newsroom

The National Fire Information Reporting System is available through the National Technical Information Service for $1,265, covering data through 1994. NICAR may consider acquiring the database if multiple journalists express interest despite the high cost.

The National Fire Information Reporting System is available from the National Technical Information Service at (703) 487-4650. The most recent year available is 1994, and, according to NTIS, the cost is $1,265. If enough journalists are interested in this data, but find the cost prohibitive, NICAR will consider acquiring the database. Send e-mail to jo@nicar.org
